en: And I've got one. I need to step to her. Step to her?
ko: 나도 하나 있어. 그녀에게 다가가야 해. 다가가라고?

en: Amy, this isn't High School Musical. Yeah, Amy, this isn't High School Musical 2.
Yeah, and it isn't High School Musical 3, Senior Year. Alright.
ko: 맞아, 하이스쿨 뮤지컬 3, 졸업년도 아니고. 알겠지.

en: Ladies and gentlemen, we are gathered here today to answer an age-old question.
ko: 신사숙녀 여러분, 오늘 우리는 오랜 질문에 답하기 위해 모였습니다.

en: Right. What's Amy's deal? She single? No. We're dating. Come on.
The question is, who here does the best impression of Captain Raymond Holt?
ko: 질문은, 여기서 누가 레이몬드 홀트 선장을 가장 잘 흉내 내는가입니다.

en: You'll be judged on voice, body language, and overall lack of flair.
ko: 목소리, 몸짓, 전반적인 화려함 부족으로 평가받을 거예요.

en: Everyone will perform the same scenario. Captain Holt eating a marshmallow for the very first time.
Let the Holt-Off begin! What is this glutinous monstrosity before me?
The sugar in this is quite sweet. Ooh!
Ha ha ha ha ha ha! That's your Holt impression?
I can hear him doing that. Looks like a sticky pillow.
I don't care for it. Classical music.
What's going on here? What are you doing? Captain, hey, nothing. Just eating some marshmallows. Care for one?
